author: Vaillant Samuel
subject: v4.3.0-beta.0
body: # [4.3.0-beta.0](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v4.2.0...v4.3.0-beta.0) (2017-11-27) ### Bug Fixes * **babelrc:** add a key for each env development, production, es ([algolia/react-instantsearch#547](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/547)) ([0055c1d](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/0055c1d)) * **localizecount:** allow localized string for count in MenuSelect ([algolia/react-instantsearch#657](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/657)) ([3d4be8a](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/3d4be8a)) * **react-router-example:** Properly update search query when using browser navigation ([algolia/react-instantsearch#604](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/604)) ([dfba8da](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/dfba8da)) ### Features * **refreshcache:** add prop refresh to InstantSearch instance ([algolia/react-instantsearch#619](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/619)) ([f1a9436](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/f1a9436))
